title: gbrain #806: MCP array schemas need items
summary: For gbrain issue 806 / PR 819, MCP facing operation params with type array must declare an items schema because strict OpenAI compatible tool validators reject arrays without items. extract facts.entity hints is an array
body:
For gbrain issue #806 / PR #819, MCP-facing operation params with type array must declare an items schema because strict OpenAI-compatible tool validators reject arrays without items. extract_facts.entity_hints is an array of canonical entity slug strings, so define items: { type: 'string' }. Keep a regression in test/mcp-tool-defs.test.ts that every generated MCP array property has items.
Evidence: Issue https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/issues/806 and PR https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/pull/819. Changed src/core/operations.ts and test/mcp-tool-defs.test.ts. The new test first failed on extract_facts.entity_hints, then passed after adding items.
Verified by: bun test test/mcp-tool-defs.test.ts, bun run typecheck, git diff --check
